# CWE-294 — Authentication Bypass by Capture-replay (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-294-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var spentNonces sync.Map

// Safe: rejects tokens whose nonce was already consumed.
func TokenLogin(c *gin.Context) {
	token := c.PostForm("auth_token")
	nonce := c.PostForm("nonce")
	if token == "" || nonce == "" {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "missing token"})
		return
	}
	if _, loaded := spentNonces.LoadOrStore(nonce, true); loaded {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "replay"})
		return
	}
	c.Set("user", "alice")
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"ok": true})
}
